This action aims to curb speculative trading and support the Indian rupee against the US dollar.

articles.title: Kerala Assembly election 2026: Opposing fronts offer to hike welfare pension, enhanced health insurance coverage, metro rail
articles.description: Both fronts release manifestos for Kerala polls on same day; UDF ‘guarantees’ include free bus travel for women, welfare pension hike to ₹3,000 per month, and ₹25 lakh health insurance; LDF backs limitless health cover and pension hike; both promise Metro projects for Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode

articles.title: Eternal, SBI, Bharti Airtel, 6 other stocks can rally up to 57%. How many do you have?
articles.description: Domestic brokerage firm Axis Direct has pegged the Nifty target for December 2026 at 29,480, implying a 30% upside from current levels. Indian equities have underperformed the US market and other emerging markets by a notable margin in 2025, leading to a meaningful moderation in valuations. The brokerage is bullish on nine largecap stocks that have the potential to rally up to 57%. Here is the full list.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Trump threatens escalation amid reported talks — ‘bridges next, then electric powerplants’
topStories.description: Trump's comment comes amid reported talks between Washington and Tehran — reports on Thursday said that indirect talks took place between US Vice President J D Vance and Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf, adding that the talks were being mediated by Pakistani army chief Asim Munir.

dailyNews.title: Who is General Randy George? US Army Chief of Staff sacked by Pete Hegseth as war with Iran drags on
dailyNews.description: During his military career, Randy George served multiple tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, including deploying for the 101st Airborne Division during Operation Desert Storm. George also commanded the 4th Brigade Combat Team during the war in Afghanistan.

dailyNews.description: Karoline Leavitt reveals President Trump offered her the White House press secretary role in a casual phone call with no formal process after the 2024 election.

dailyNews.title: Trump slaps up to 100% tariff on some brand-name drug imports in major America First push
dailyNews.description: President Trump unveiled a tiered tariff plan hitting some imported drugs with rates up to 100%, aiming to boost U.S. manufacturing and reduce reliance on foreign supply chains.

dailyNews.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche addressed Pam Bondi’s firing, noting reports of President Donald Trump's dissatisfaction with the handling of Epstein files, on Fox News.

dailyNews.title: Two arrested in NC after police find 13-year-old kept in dog kennel, 5 other kids in 'filthy' home
dailyNews.description: A man and a woman are facing child abuse charges after six children were rescued from a "filthy" home, including one child who was kept in a dog kennel.

dailyNews.title: Heart-pounding video shows fisherman leaping into ocean to save great white shark
dailyNews.description: Shocking video captures a fisherman wrestling a shark in the pounding Hermosa Beach surf to cut it free from his fishing line.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth signs memo opening door for troops to carry personal firearms on bases
dailyNews.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth signs a memo directing military bases to allow service members to ask to carry their personal firearms amid security concerns.

dailyNews.title: Lindsey Buckingham's alleged stalker speaks out after Fleetwood Mac star attacked in LA
dailyNews.description: A woman accused of stalking Fleetwood Mac's Lindsey Buckingham reportedly has spoken out. She has a years-long history of stalking, threats and false claims against him.

dailyNews.title: Phil Mickelson withdraws from the Masters, joins Tiger Woods in sitting out signature major
dailyNews.description: Phil Mickelson said he will miss the Masters this year to navigate a personal family health matter, becoming another golf icon to miss the major alongside Tiger Woods.

dailyNews.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
dailyNews.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.title: Rival Nations Seize On Choke Points to Counter Trump
dailyNews.description: From Iran to China, President Trump’s global aggression has encouraged other countries to search for new ways to pressure the U.S. economy.

dailyNews.title: The Awe of a Moon Launch in an Age of Trump, Turmoil and Tribal Divisions
dailyNews.description: The launch of Artemis II captured the tenor of the times in a country that can still do big things but seems forever mired in big problems.

dailyNews.title: Planning Commission Approves Trump’s Ballroom, but Legal Roadblocks Remain
dailyNews.description: The board had been expected to vote to approve the project last month, but it was delayed after about 32,000 mostly negative comments rolled in from across the country.

dailyNews.title: What to Know About the ‘Massive’ Military Bunker Beneath Trump’s Ballroom
dailyNews.description: President Trump has been talking about the emergency facility beneath what was once the East Wing, details of which are usually kept secret, as he tries to justify his renovation.

dailyNews.title: Being Trump’s ‘Friend’ in Europe Is Becoming a Real Liability
dailyNews.description: For more than three years, Giorgia Meloni’s leadership of Italy has seemed unshakable. Now she suddenly seems vulnerable.

dailyNews.title: The One Thing Trump Wanted That Pam Bondi Failed to Deliver
dailyNews.description: The core of Mr. Trump’s dissatisfaction with the attorney general was apparently her failure to serve his need for revenge against his enemies.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran"
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran," and previewed that strikes on bridges and power plants could be next.

dailyNews.title: Cuba says it released over 2,000 prisoners as White House heaps pressure on island
dailyNews.description: The Cuban government says it has pardoned and released 2,010 prisoners, a sweeping move that comes as the island nation grapples with pressure from the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi: Here's what we know
dailyNews.description: President Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi on Thursday after months of his waning support. CBS News covers the lead-up, her acting replacement and what this means.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department employee who was prosecuted over Jan. 6 Capitol attack resigns
dailyNews.description: A former FBI agent who was prosecuted for his alleged role in the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol and later hired by the Trump-era Justice Department has left his government post, he announced Thursday.

dailyNews.title: 4/2: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi; Artemis II gets green light for translunar injection burn.
